title: Company Bank Account
description: Commerce v1 reference to a company bank account registry entry used for direct bank transfer instructions.
$comment: Sources: TECH-04 states bank account information must come from registry/runtime source and must not be hardcoded. TODO: source documents do not define bank account registry fields or masking policy.

company_bank_account_id.description: Registry identifier for company bank account.

account_number_masked.description: Masked account number for safe display.

status.description: Registry account status. TODO: define official bank account status enum.

no_hardcode.description: Invariant: account data is sourced from registry/runtime source.
